title: Oscar winners 2026 complete list - CBS News
text: Autumn Durald Arkapaw won the Academy Award for Best Cinematography at the 2026 Oscars for her work on the film Sinners. This was a historic win, as the article notes that Arkapaw became the first woman to win that award. The film Sinners came into the ceremony with a record-breaking 16 nominations, the most of any movie ever at the Academy Awards.
